payload.answer: The new fact conflicts with the existing current fact because it says Sam left Goldman and joined Point72, while the current memory says Sam works at Goldman. Safe actions available: approve_supersession to treat the new employment transition as replacing the current Goldman employment fact; keep_both to retain both facts if the situation is ambiguous or both may be contextually true; reject_new to leave the current Goldman fact unchanged and not store the new claim; edit to modify the proposed memory before saving. I will not assume supersession automatically.

entity_resolution.reason: Both facts refer to Sam, but no backend entity identifier was supplied.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.

details: Conflict detected between existing current employment fact and new employment transition fact.
